title: Senior Software Engineer - Adobe India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Adobe India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adobe India:
Adobe India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India!
